question_intent: Total charge amount for members in the North American region who have made payments in the same month as their charges, excluding charges from the Travel category

plan.question_intent: Total charge amount for members in the North American region who have made payments in the same month as their charges, excluding charges from the Travel category
plan.detail_query:
SELECT leaf_1.charge_no, leaf_1.charge_dt, leaf_1.charge_amt, leaf_1.category_desc, leaf_1.payment_dt
FROM (SELECT c.charge_no, c.charge_dt, c.charge_amt, cat.category_desc, p.payment_dt
FROM charge c
JOIN category cat ON c.category_no = cat.category_no
LEFT JOIN payment p ON c.member_no = p.member_no AND strftime('%Y-%m', c.charge_dt) = strftime('%Y-%m', p.payment_dt)
JOIN member m ON c.member_no = m.member_no
JOIN region r ON m.region_no = r.region_no
WHERE r.region_name = 'North American' AND cat.category_desc != 'Travel') AS leaf_1

blocks.name: leaf_1
blocks.select_clause: SELECT c.charge_no, c.charge_dt, c.charge_amt, cat.category_desc, p.payment_dt
join_clauses: JOIN category cat ON c.category_no = cat.category_no
LEFT JOIN payment p ON c.member_no = p.member_no AND strftime('%Y-%m', c.charge_dt) = strftime('%Y-%m', p.payment_dt)
JOIN member m ON c.member_no = m.member_no
JOIN region r ON m.region_no = r.region_no
blocks.notes: Joins charge with category, payment, member, and region tables to get charge details, category description, and payment date for North American members, excluding Travel category charges

SELECT *
FROM charge c
JOIN category cat ON c.category_no = cat.category_no
LIMIT 5

build_logs.notes: Aggregates the total charge amount from the leaf_1 subquery

steps.sql:
SELECT *
FROM (SELECT c.charge_no, c.charge_dt, c.charge_amt, cat.category_desc, p.payment_dt
FROM charge c
JOIN category cat ON c.category_no = cat.category_no
LEFT JOIN payment p ON c.member_no = p.member_no AND strftime('%Y-%m', c.charge_dt) = strftime('%Y-%m', p.payment_dt)
JOIN member m ON c.member_no = m.member_no
JOIN region r ON m.region_no = r.region_no
WHERE (r.region_name IN ('North American', 'South American')) AND (cat.category_desc != 'Travel')) AS leaf_1
LIMIT 5

SELECT SUM(leaf_1.charge_amt) AS total_charge_amount
FROM (SELECT c.charge_no, c.charge_dt, c.charge_amt, cat.category_desc, p.payment_dt
FROM charge c
JOIN category cat ON c.category_no = cat.category_no
LEFT JOIN payment p ON c.member_no = p.member_no AND strftime('%Y-%m', c.charge_dt) = strftime('%Y-%m', p.payment_dt)
JOIN member m ON c.member_no = m.member_no
JOIN region r ON m.region_no = r.region_no
WHERE (r.region_name IN ('North American', 'South American')) AND (cat.category_desc != 'Travel')) AS leaf_1

nearest.sql:
SELECT SUM(leaf_1.charge_amt) AS total_charge_amount
FROM (SELECT c.member_no, c.charge_dt, c.charge_amt, p.payment_dt
FROM charge c
LEFT JOIN payment p ON c.member_no = p.member_no AND strftime('%Y-%m', c.charge_dt) = strftime('%Y-%m', p.payment_dt)
JOIN member m ON c.member_no = m.member_no
JOIN region r ON m.region_no = r.region_no
WHERE (r.region_name = 'North American' OR r.region_name = 'South American')) AS leaf_1

SELECT SUM(leaf_2.charge_amt)
FROM (SELECT c.charge_no, m.region_no
FROM charge AS c
JOIN member AS m ON c.member_no = m.member_no
JOIN region AS r ON m.region_no = r.region_no
WHERE (r.region_name = 'South American')) AS leaf_1
JOIN (SELECT c.charge_no, c.charge_amt
FROM charge AS c
JOIN category AS cat ON c.category_no = cat.category_no
WHERE (cat.category_desc != 'Travel')) AS leaf_2 ON leaf_1.charge_no = leaf_2.charge_no

question: What is the total charge amount for all charges that are not in the 'Travel' category and are associated with members from the North American or South American regions?
